# Vendored Ember Runtime

- Source: https://github.com/components/ember
- Tag: `2.9.1`
- Commit: `263fae8e68eb4453579deb467ccaf1bfa43d6cb5`
- License: MIT, as declared by upstream `bower.json` and file headers.
- Files: `ember.debug.js`, `ember.prod.js`, `ember-testing.js`, `ember-template-compiler.js`.

This preserves the Rancher 1.6 UI runtime/compiler version while removing Bower as the source resolver. It is not a framework upgrade.
